shows.desc: music enjoyer plays a different flavor of tunes every week

shows.name: The Spice Cabinet: Big Shrimp Fried Rice
shows.desc: The Spice Cabinet is a show that focuses on creating music and reviewing music. We do an artist of the week every show and will showcase music we have made. Sometimes we will have surprise guests or segments.

shows.name: Daniel Moore’s: Music and You
shows.desc: Join Daniel Moore as he plays some of his favorite songs and tells you about what the music means to him.
